title: Notifications -  Update Available OFF
scenario: No notification appears when pairing a device with outdated firmware if the "Device Software Update" notification is disabled and the app is in the background.
steps: Ensure the device has a firmware version lower than the current version on the server (Cloud).
Turn OFF the 'Device Software Update' notification in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts.
Ensure the Poly App is running in the background on a mobile device.
expected: No notification should appear upon successful pairing.
